rows.label: qev017301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, speak of the devil... I
was just talking about you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0002
rows.name:
You know, recently, looking at the data
sent from the Data Probes in various
areas, it's pretty much all yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Everyone is getting curious as
to exactly how you're expanding
Frontier Net so much...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hehe, but it's best to ask the
person themselves. Do you have
some special exploration method?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Explain that you have
your own unique method.

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0020
rows.name: Secret

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Refuse to tell, stating
it's a trade secret.

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Amazing... Even the developers
never assumed such a method.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'm truly glad someone
like you came along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0007
rows.name:
Are you treating the other
Pathfinders as rivals?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0008
rows.name:
I see, that high level of awareness
might be the secret to planting
that many Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Right, I just happen to have a
rare resource collection mission
centered around Shiraki no Tairiku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Along with a subjugation mission
for the Nectar Cirnea that have
been rampaging around there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0011
rows.name:
And searching for a new Data Unit
whose signal was found in that area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Won't you accomplish all these
missions and show your power
to the young Pathfinders?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm sure it will be a good stimulus
for them. Come on, please?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Oh right... If you accomplish the
mission, I'll give you a special reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'll tell you about the highly classified
Data Units you've gathered so many of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Say you are happy to learn the true
identity of what you've been gathering.

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0040
rows.name: Dubious

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0041
rows.name:
Question if it's okay to reveal
highly classified data.

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm sorry for having you gather something
of unknown nature up until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0017
rows.name:
To be honest, I intended to see it through
by myself until the very end, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0018
rows.name: I found myself wanting to tell you too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Even though it's highly classified,
there are no members left who even
know it was highly classified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0020
rows.name:
It's fine. It's because I
wanted to tell you... okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Well then, mission start. Finish
it perfectly, just like always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0022
rows.name:
I wonder what method you'll
use to gather Aurora Stone
with Frontier Net this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'll be looking forward to the
data being sent in. Do your best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Gathering the precious Aurora
Stone so easily... Everyone was
amazed watching your work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0025
rows.name:
All that's left are the missions
in Shiraki no Tairiku. Finish
those up just like always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Are the missions already complete,
perhaps? That's amazing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0027
rows.name:
To tell the truth, this was a mission
that several Pathfinders had challenged
and failed to accomplish...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Yeah, you really are the real deal...
A BLADE truly worthy of inheriting
the will of my comrades...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Say, about the Data Units
you've been gathering. Let me
tell you about them, as promised.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0051
rows.name:
Prompt her to speak, saying you
definitely want to hear it.

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0060
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0061
rows.name:
Try to cut the conversation short,
demanding the reward rather than a story.

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Thank you. It'll be a bit
long, so please bear with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please, just listen properly this one
time. This is a very important story.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0032
rows.name:
...At the same time the Earth Life Colonization Project
was launched, the issue of how to secure resources and
information on the destination planet was raised.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0033
rows.name:
The project team formed to
solve that was "Frontier"[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0034
rows.name:
Many researchers, including myself, belonged
to it, and we continued our research to solve
the issue throughout the entire voyage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0035
rows.name:
Everyone worked day and night
without sleep, saying we
couldn't waste a single day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0036
rows.name:
And finally, we succeeded in
putting this Frontier Net
into practical use, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0037
rows.name:
When the White Whale was attacked
by the Growth, our research
facility came under enemy fire.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0038
rows.name:
Carrying many of my comrades and the Data
Units that were being developed in top
secret, it fell to this planet Mira[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0039
rows.name:
Since then, I haven't seen any of
them. No survival reports have come
through Frontier Net either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0070
rows.name: Console

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0071
rows.name:
Offer kind words to Kirsty,
who has a somber expression.

rows.label: qev017301_JNK0080
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev017301_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask how Kirsty managed to survive.

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Thank you... But I won't look back.
None of them would want that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0041
rows.name:
I just happened to be out
teaching the Coalition forces
how to handle Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0042
rows.name:
I was away from the research
facility... Thanks to that I
survived, but everyone else...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0043
rows.name:
...No, it's no use getting depressed.
I'll just use this surviving life
for the sake of humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0044
rows.name:
...So, to get to the main point, there
are five of these Data Units in total.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0045
rows.name:
And inside them should be the data
of a top-secret project known as the
"Next-Generation Frontier Net".[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0046
rows.name:
It was research my comrades continued
voluntarily after the development
of Frontier Net was finished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0047
rows.name:
It's research data that probably even
Secretary Nagi doesn't know about. Even
I don't know the contents at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0048
rows.name:
...I want to inherit the feelings of
my comrades who exhausted themselves
for the prosperity of humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0049
rows.name:
So please, if you find the location
of the final Data Unit, you must
find it no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0050
rows.name:
And let's accept together what it was
that my comrades tried to entrust to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev017301_MSG0051
rows.name: I'm counting on you, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]
